productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Blue Football France Striker Backpack
description: Style Note A backpack easily distributes the weight across your shoulders and back, making loads easy to carry while keeping you looking cool and confident. Fill this trendy nike backpacks with your sportswear when you're heading to the field or gym or use it on a trek in the great outdoors, and enjoy the ample storing space for all your gear. Product Details A midnight blue backpack with a nike swoosh and a small print in the front The backpack has decorative graffiti on the sides Two padded shoulder straps, one short handle on top and padded back One main zippered compartment with an internal drawstring pouch to carry your ball Material and Care 100% polyester exterior, 100% nylon lining Do not machine wash or dry clean Do not bleach or iron Wipe with a damp cloth when necessary and line dry Size Height: 50 cm Width: 32 cm Depth: 19 cm
